{{CargoOrgan
|name=Spine of Gaia
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10883
|idx=94
|description=Earth's Will was dismembered by Demon Gods. Some organs were retrieved and given as Reconstruction Feast rewards.
|skill=
|hp=3440
|def=239
|atk=260
|rush=227
|gene1=Earth DMG +120
|gene2=DMG REDUC +4%
|gene3=CRIT DMG REDUC +10%
|gene4=Earth RES +120
|gene5=DMG REDUC +4%
|gene6=CRIT DMG REDUC +10%
|gene7=Earth DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
